chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 493 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 20.11.2023 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for applicant. No intimation is received. Case diaries show that applicant is not much interested, and on most of the dates, even his Counsel remained absent. Accordingly, this application is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
